mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_STUDENT SET APPLICANT_NAME = #{applicant_name}, APPLICANT_BIRTH = #{applicant_birth}, APPLICANT_OLD = #{applicant_old}, APPLICANT_SEX = #{applicant_sex}, APPLICANT_ZIPCODE = #{applicant_zipcode}, APPLICANT_ADDRESS = #{applicant_address}, APPLICANT_ADDRESS_DETAIL= #{applicant_address_detail}, APPLICANT_PHONE = #{applicant_phone}, APPLICANT_CELL_PHONE = #{applicant_cell_phone}, SELF_YN = #{self_yn}, STUDENT_NAME = #{student_name}, STUDENT_BIRTH = #{student_birth}, STUDENT_SEX = #{student_sex}, STUDENT_ZIPCODE = #{student_zipcode}, STUDENT_ADDRESS = #{student_address}, STUDENT_ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{student_address_detail}, STUDENT_SCHOOL = #{student_school}, STUDENT_HACK = #{student_hack}, STUDENT_OLD = #{student_old}, SELF_INFO_YN = #{self_info_yn}, student_ban = #{student_ban}, student_remark = #{student_remark}, student_family_count = #{student_family_count}, student_location_code = #{student_location_code}, student_neis_cd = #{student_neis_cd}, student_training_num = #{student_training_num}, student_organization = #{student_organization}, student_rank = #{student_rank}, student_course_taken_yn = #{student_course_taken_yn}, APPLY_STATUS = #{apply_status}, FAMILY_RELATION = #{family_relation}, FAMILY_NAME = #{family_name}, FAMILY_CELL_PHONE = #{family_cell_phone}, FAMILY_CONFIRM_YN = #{family_confirm_yn}, FAMILY_DESC = #{family_desc}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, belong_name = #{belong_name} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND STUDENT_IDX = #{student_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_STUDENT WHERE APPLY_STATUS != '99' AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND TRAINING_IDX != #{training_idx} AND (HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX) IN (SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX FROM TRAINING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TRAINING_NAME = (SELECT TRAINING_NAME FROM TRAINING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx}))

SELECT A.*, CASE WHEN A.CNT = 0 THEN '2' WHEN (A.ATTEND_CNT/A.CNT)*100 >= #{cert_percent} THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS STUDENT_STATUS FROM ( SELECT a.STUDENT_IDX, a.BELONG_IDX, a.BELONG_NAME, a.STUDENT_NAME, a.STUDENT_ADDRESS, a.STUDENT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, a.STUDENT_BIRTH, a.STUDENT_OLD , (SELECT TRAINING_COUNT FROM TRAINING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = a.TRAINING_IDX) AS CNT , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(status, '1', 1, '2', 1, 0)) - TRUNC(SUM(DECODE(status, '2', 1, 0))/3), 0) FROM TRAINING_BOOK WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = a.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = a.STUDENT_IDX) as ATTEND_CNT FROM TRAINING_STUDENT a WHERE a.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND a.TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} ) A

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, STUDENT_IDX, MEMBER_KEY, APPLICANT_NAME, APPLICANT_BIRTH , APPLICANT_OLD, APPLICANT_SEX, APPLICANT_ZIPCODE, APPLICANT_ADDRESS, APPLICANT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, APPLICANT_PHONE, APPLICANT_CELL_PHONE, SELF_YN , STUDENT_NAME, STUDENT_BIRTH, STUDENT_SEX, STUDENT_ZIPCODE, STUDENT_ADDRESS, STUDENT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, STUDENT_SCHOOL, STUDENT_HACK, STUDENT_OLD , SELF_INFO_YN, APPLY_STATUS, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS ADD_DATE, cancel_id, cancel_date FROM TRAINING_STUDENT WHERE (HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, STUDENT_IDX) IN ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, MIN(STUDENT_IDX) FROM TRAINING_STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND APPLY_STATUS = 2 GROUP BY HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT result.*, CASE WHEN result.TRAINING_COUNT = 0 THEN '2' WHEN result.ATTEND_CNT < 70 THEN '2' WHEN result.ATTEND_CNT >= 70 THEN '1' END AS STUDENT_STATUS FROM (SELECT a.training_name, a.training_desc, a.training_etc, a.training_stage, a.training_target, a.training_status, a.training_join_unit, a.training_limit_count, a.training_backup_count, a.training_offline_count, a.teacher_idx, a.training_join_limit_unit, a.training_join_limit_value, a.start_join_date, a.start_join_time, a.end_join_date, a.end_join_time, a.training_day, a.start_date, a.start_time, a.end_date, a.end_time, a.training_count, a.plan_file_name, a.real_file_name, a.file_extension, a.file_size, a.member_yn, a.use_yn, a.print_seq, a.certificate_yn, a.certificate_rate, a.survey_idx, a.training_same_limit_count, a.image_plan_file_name, a.image_real_file_name, a.image_file_extension, a.image_file_size, a.family_yn, a.limit_hak, a.calendar_view_yn, a.limit_hak_yn, a.family_count_yn, a.agent_yn, a.school_info_yn, a.remark_yn, a.limit_hak2, a.program_classification1, a.program_classification2, a.program_classification3, a.program_subject, a.program_age_div, a.neis_location_yn, a.neis_cd_yn, a.neis_training_num_yn, b.homepage_id, b.group_idx, b.category_idx, b.training_idx, b.student_idx, b.member_id, b.member_key, b.applicant_name, b.applicant_birth, b.applicant_old, b.applicant_sex, b.applicant_zipcode, b.applicant_address, b.applicant_address_detail, b.applicant_phone, b.applicant_cell_phone, b.self_yn, b.student_name, b.student_birth, b.student_old, b.student_sex, b.student_zipcode, b.student_address, b.student_address_detail, b.student_school, b.student_hack, b.self_info_yn, b.apply_type, b.apply_status, b.pay1_yn, b.pay2_yn, b.pay3_yn, b.cancel_date, b.cancel_id, b.add_date, b.add_id, b.mod_date, b.mod_id, b.delete_yn, b.family_relation, b.family_name, b.family_confirm_yn, b.family_desc, b.web_id, b.student_family_count, b.student_ban, b.student_remark, b.sub_category_idx, b.student_location_code, b.student_neis_cd, b.student_training_num, b.large_category_idx, b.group_temp, b.category_temp, b.training_temp, CASE WHEN a.training_count = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(status, '1', 1, '2', 1, 0)) - TRUNC(SUM(DECODE(status, '2', 1, 0))/3), 0) FROM TRAINING_BOOK WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = b.STUDENT_IDX)/a.training_count)*100 END as ATTEND_CNT FROM (SELECT homepage_id, group_idx, category_idx, training_idx, training_name, training_desc, training_etc, training_stage, training_target, training_status, training_join_unit, training_limit_count, training_backup_count, training_offline_count, teacher_idx, training_join_limit_unit, training_join_limit_value, start_join_date, start_join_time, end_join_date, end_join_time, training_day, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, training_count, plan_file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, member_yn, use_yn, print_seq, certificate_yn, certificate_rate, survey_idx, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, delete_yn, training_same_limit_count, image_plan_file_name, image_real_file_name, image_file_extension, image_file_size, family_yn, limit_hak, calendar_view_yn, limit_hak_yn, family_count_yn, agent_yn, school_info_yn, remark_yn, limit_hak2, program_classification1, program_classification2, program_classification3, program_subject, program_age_div, sub_category_idx, neis_location_yn, neis_cd_yn, neis_training_num_yn, large_category_idx, group_temp, category_temp, training_temp FROM TRAINING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ) a, TRAINING_STUDENT b WHERE b.HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND b.GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND b.CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND b.TRAINING_IDX = a.TRAINING_IDX AND b.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND b.APPLY_STATUS = '1' AND b.member_key = #{member_key} ) result ) WHERE student_status = '1'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_STUDENT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND group_idx = #{group_idx}
AND member_key = #{userNo} AND add_date >= TO_DATE(#{fromDateStr}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND add_date <= TO_DATE(#{toDateStr}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND apply_status = '1'
SELECT homepage_id, training_idx, student_idx, member_id, member_key, applicant_cell_phone FROM TRAINING_STUDENT WHERE training_idx = #{training_idx} AND apply_status != 99
